title: Quinn Emanuel Co-Founder John B. Quinn steps down from leadership
description: John B. Quinn, Co-Founder of Quinn Emanuel Urquhart & Sullivan, is set to step down from his position of Executive Chairman of the Firm.Quinn will remain a partner at the firm and retain the title of non-executive chair, allowing him to focus on promoting Quinn Emanuel and client development, the firm announced Sunday.Confirming the development, Quinn himself shared,"After four decades at Quinn Emanuel, I will be stepping back from my Executive Committee role but continuing as Chairman.My fo
